title: Indicators parity index
description: Aggregate roll-up of parity status across every indicator that has an `iced` (or other comparable) upstream. Lives at `datasets/reference/in/indicators-parity.json`. Sibling of `indicators-completeness.json`; same generated-index pattern, regenerated by `tools/iced_parity/` after each parity run. The admin Parity panel sorts the `indicators` array by `divergent_cell_count` descending and renders NOTHING for matched indicators (resolution §5(d) anti-rot lever: operators literally cannot skim past green checks because there are no green checks visible). Each indicator row summarises the MOST RECENT parity run only; full history is on the per-indicator ledger (`datasets/parity/in/<id>.ledger.jsonl`, see `parity-observation.schema.json`).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema (Phase 2 step 5 of TODO/20260517-iced-bulk-ingest-and-parity-oracle.md). Aggregate index file; one row per indicator with `id`, `ledger_path`, `last_run_id`, `last_sampled_at`, `sample_count_last_run`, `sample_count_total`, `status_counts_last_run` (object keyed by the six `parity-observation.schema.json` status values), `divergent_cell_count` (sum of `diverge + revised_upstream + missing_upstream + missing_ours` from `status_counts_last_run`; sort key for the admin Parity panel per §5(d)), `under_review` (boolean; set when `divergent_cell_count` exceeds 5% of `sample_count_last_run` per §5(c) failure budget). Generated, never hand-edited; `sources: []` per §12 generated-index convention.

sources.description: Per CLAUDE.md §12: empty array signals a hand-authored / generated index (this file is derived from the per-indicator ledgers and the indicator artifacts themselves, not from any single upstream URL).

generated_at.description: YYYY-MM-DD date the index was last regenerated. Derived from the maximum `sampled_at` of the input ledger files (per CLAUDE.md provenance rule: derived-from-content, not wall-clock at write time).

indicators.description: One entry per indicator that has a parity ledger. Sorted by `divergent_cell_count` descending by emitter convention (the admin Parity panel honours the order without re-sorting). Indicators with no ledger yet are absent from this list, not present with empty counts.

ledger_path.description: POSIX-relative path under repo root to the per-indicator ledger (`datasets/parity/in/<id>.ledger.jsonl`).

last_run_id.description: The `run_id` of the most recent parity run that contributed observations for this indicator. Matches the `run_id` on the most recent ledger lines.

last_sampled_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of the most recent `sampled_at` across the last run's observations for this indicator.

sample_count_last_run.description: Number of cells the most recent parity run observed for this indicator.

sample_count_total.description: Total number of observations in the ledger across all runs (line count of the JSONL file).

status_counts_last_run.description: Counts of each status value across the most recent run's observations for this indicator. Keys mirror the `status` enum in `parity-observation.schema.json` exactly.

divergent_cell_count.description: Sum of `diverge + revised_upstream + missing_upstream + missing_ours` from `status_counts_last_run`. Pre-computed (rather than derived in the consumer) because it is the sort key for the admin Parity panel and is emitted in pre-sorted order; consumers MAY re-derive as a cross-check.

under_review.description: True when `divergent_cell_count / sample_count_last_run > 0.05` (5% failure budget per resolution §5(c)). The topic page roll honours this flag and holds the indicator out until parity is restored. The threshold is reviewed quarterly after the first 10 audits.
